title: run/create: reserve `-h` flag for hostname
body:
Move the `-h` short flag from `--help` to `--hostname` for podman-run,
podman-create and podman-pod-create to be compatible with Docker.

Fixes: #1367
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body:
I thought we'd have to touch up bash completions for rund/create too, but I'm not seeing them.  Do we not have completions for run/create or am I lacking tea?  (libpod/completions/bash/podman)
Otherwise LGTM

@TomSweeneyRedHat, it's not your tea. The bash completion is oddly broken there. There are two `_podman_container_run()` functions. One of them causes a loop and the other one actually mentions `--hostname -h` :laughing: 

I suggest fixing that in a separate PR as it smells like a rabbit hole.

:pushpin: Commit 36313a5 has been approved by `rhatdan`
